description_long: This street cabinet is a tall, rectangular metal enclosure with a robust protective cage made of steel mesh on all sides. The main body inside the cage appears to house electrical or communication equipment, with visible panels and a warning label indicating high voltage or restricted access. The cabinet is painted in a muted gray-blue color, and the mesh design allows for ventilation while preventing unauthorized access. The top and bottom are solid metal, while the sides and front are dominated by the mesh grid. The interior equipment is mounted vertically and is partially visible through the mesh, with some labeling and technical markings. The overall construction suggests durability and security for outdoor urban environments.
description: A tall, metal street cabinet with a protective steel mesh cage, housing electrical or communication equipment and featuring warning signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mesh cage, main equipment panel, and a visible warning label.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile and the depth of the mesh enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the mesh cage and the equipment, similar to the front but without signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the mesh structure and internal components from a different angle.
